calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR SHORT CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-27-2009 Assigned To Trial Court

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Jul-27-2009 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Comm: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

Harold B. Auerbach, Esq. appeared for plaintiff George Ballard Company, a corporation.
Alan D. Fong, Senior Collective Reporsentative Credit and Collections Service for plaintiff, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Iron City, Inc., a corporation dba Creative Iron.
Dismissals without prejudice as to defendants Rajeev Narang, an individual, dba Creative Iron, and Shehzad Madan, an individual, dba Creative Iron, were filed on May 1, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed today, July 27, 2009.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on November 17, 2008, which set trial in this matter for March 2, 2009. Upon Ex Parte Application by defendants filed February 20, 2009, trial was reset for today, July 27, 2009.

Plaintiff introduced the following exhibits:

Exhibit 1--State Compensation Insurance Fund Invoice, dated 1/2/07-------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 2--State Compensation Insurance Fund Invoice, dated 5/3/07-------------------ID/EVID.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff George Ballard Company, a corporation, and against defendant Iron City, Inc., a corporation, dba Creative Iron as follows:

Principal - $59,727.31.
Interest - $13,333.40.
Attorney's Fees - $1,000.00.
Costs - $500.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $74,560.71.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Jun-26-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT IRON CITY, INC., RAJEEV NARANG, SHEHZAD MADAN, MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Granted, no opposition filed as to Defendant Iron City. Off calendar as moot as to Defendants Narang and Madan. (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine CSR 5797

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Jun-05-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Leon V. Roubinian, Esq. of the Roubinian Law Group, Motion to be relieved as counsel for DEFENDANT IRON CITY, INC. Appearances: Leon V. Roubinian, Esq. of the Roubinian Law Group, (415) 717-8657, appearing for Defendant and moving party. No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: MOTION GRANTED. Order signed in open Court.(302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR 5759

MASTER CALENDAR SHORT CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-20-2009 Continued To Jul-27-09 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion For Order That The Genuineness Of Documents And Truth Of Facts Be Admitted And Compelling Responses To Interrogatories And Production Of Documents And For Monetary Sanctions Including Attorneys' Fees
Off Calendar Feb-03-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. Plaintiff George Ballard Company's motion for an order to deem certain matters admitted and to compel responses to interrogatories and request for production of documents is ordered off calendar as it was not timely noticed. CCP Section 1005, requires that motions be served and filed 16 court days prior to the hearing, with five calendar days added if the motion was served by mail. The motion was filed on January 7, 2009. Judge: Bruce Chan. Not reported.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-17-2008 Set For Trial On Mar-02-09 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
